popular: Luke, I am your father
actual: No, I am your father.

popular: Play it again, Sam
actual: Play it, Sam. Play 'As Time Goes By.'

popular: Beam me up, Scotty
actual: Scotty, beam us up.
film: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home

popular: We're gonna need a bigger boat
actual: You're gonna need a bigger boat.

popular: Mirror, mirror on the wall, who is the fairest of them all?
actual: Magic mirror on the wall, who is the fairest one of all?
film: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

popular: If you build it, they will come
actual: If you build it, he will come.

popular: Hello, Clarice
actual: Good evening, Clarice.

popular: Do you feel lucky, punk?
actual: You've got to ask yourself one question: 'Do I feel lucky?' Well, do ya, punk?

popular: Frankly, Scarlett, I don't give a damn
actual: Frankly, my dear, I don't give a damn.

popular: I'll make him an offer he can't refuse
actual: I'm going to make him an offer he can't refuse.

popular: Toto, I don't think we're in Kansas anymore
actual: Toto, I've a feeling we're not in Kansas anymore.

popular: Greed is good
actual: Greed, for lack of a better word, is good.

popular: Run, you fools!
actual: Fly, you fools!
film: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

popular: Life is like a box of chocolates
actual: My mom always said life was like a box of chocolates.

popular: Badges? We don't need no stinking badges!
actual: Badges? We ain't got no badges. We don't need no badges. I don't have to show you any stinking badges!
film: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre

popular: Fasten your seatbelts, it's going to be a bumpy ride
actual: Fasten your seatbelts. It's going to be a bumpy night.

popular: Me Tarzan, you Jane
actual: Jane. Tarzan. Jane. Tarzan.

popular: You dirty rat
actual: That dirty, double-crossing rat.

popular: Win one for the Gipper
actual: Win just one for the Gipper.

popular: The first rule of Fight Club is don't talk about Fight Club
actual: The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.

popular: Nobody puts Baby in the corner
actual: Nobody puts Baby in a corner.

popular: You're a wizard, Harry
actual: Yer a wizard, Harry.
film: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

popular: Keep your friends close and your enemies closer
actual: Keep your friends close, but your enemies closer.

popular: These are not the droids you're looking for
actual: These aren't the droids you're looking for.

popular: Snakes. Why did it have to be snakes?
actual: Snakes. Why'd it have to be snakes?

popular: What we have here is a failure to communicate
actual: What we've got here is failure to communicate.

popular: I love the smell of napalm in the morning. It smells like victory
actual: I love the smell of napalm in the morning. You know, one time we had a hill bombed for twelve hours. The smell, you know, that gasoline smell. The whole hill. Smelled like victory.

popular: Open the pod bay doors, HAL
actual: Open the pod bay doors, please, HAL.

popular: Mrs. Robinson, are you trying to seduce me?
actual: Mrs. Robinson, you're trying to seduce me. Aren't you?

popular: I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice bottle of Chianti
actual: I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.

popular: Top of the world, Ma!
actual: Made it, Ma! Top of the world!

popular: Every time a bell rings, an angel gets its wings
actual: Every time you hear a bell ring, it means that some angel's just got his wings.

popular: Why don't you come up and see me sometime?
actual: Why don't you come up sometime and see me?

popular: Get your stinking paws off me, you damn dirty ape
actual: Take your stinking paws off me, you damn dirty ape!

popular: I'm mad as hell and I'm not going to take it anymore
actual: I'm as mad as hell, and I'm not going to take this anymore!

popular: The stuff dreams are made of
actual: The, uh, stuff that dreams are made of.

popular: It puts the lotion on its skin
actual: It rubs the lotion on its skin.

popular: Houston, we've got a problem
actual: Houston, we have a problem.

popular: I'll be back
actual: I'll be back.
note: Said first and most famously here, then quoted by half of cinema.

popular: I'm the king of the world
actual: I'm the king of the world!
note: The line everyone knows from the bow of the ship.

popular: No, I am your father
actual: No, I am your father.
note: The real phrasing of the most misquoted line in film; no Luke in it.

popular: You know what's cooler than a million dollars? A billion dollars
actual: A million dollars isn't cool. You know what's cool? A billion dollars.

popular: I have a particular set of skills
actual: But what I do have are a very particular set of skills.

popular: It's not personal, it's strictly business
actual: It's not personal, Sonny. It's strictly business.

popular: I'm just a girl, standing in front of a boy, asking him to love her
actual: I'm also just a girl, standing in front of a boy, asking him to love her.

popular: We all go a little crazy sometimes
actual: We all go a little mad sometimes.

popular: Would you like to play a game?
actual: I want to play a game.

popular: Like tears in the rain
actual: All those moments will be lost in time, like tears in rain.

popular: I'm ready for my close-up, Mr. DeMille
actual: All right, Mr. DeMille, I'm ready for my close-up.

popular: He's alive!
actual: It's alive! It's alive!

popular: It was beauty that killed the beast
actual: It was beauty killed the beast.

popular: A man's gotta do what a man's gotta do
actual: A man ought to do what he thinks is best.

popular: Please, sir, can I have some more?
actual: Please, sir, I want some more.

popular: I'm out of order? You're out of order! This whole court's out of order!
actual: You're out of order! You're out of order! The whole trial is out of order! They're out of order!

popular: Fly, my pretties, fly!
actual: Now fly, fly!

popular: Go ahead, make my day
actual: Go ahead, make my day.
note: Often credited to Dirty Harry; it is from the fourth film, Sudden Impact.
